Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

leagues = {
    'Premier League': 841,
    'Championship': 863,
    'Bundesliga': 1007,
    'La Liga': 1108,
    'Serie A': 3775,
    'Ligue 1': 1104,
}

with sync_playwright\(\) as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch\(headless=True\)
    ctx = browser.new_context\(
        user_agent='Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36',
    \)
    ctx.set_extra_http_headers\({
        'Accept': 'application/json, text/plain, */*',
        'Referer': 'https://betking.com/',
    }\)
    page = ctx.new_page\(\)
    page.goto\('https://betking.com/sports', wait_until='networkidle'\)
    
    for name, lid in leagues.items\(\):
        url = f'https://sportsapicdn-desktop.betking.com/api/feeds/prematch/en/4/{lid}/0/0'
        resp = page.request.get\(url\)
        data = resp.json\(\)
        am = data.get\('AreaMatches', []\)
        total = data.get\('TotalNoOfItems', 0\)
        items = am[0].get\('Items', []\) if am else []
        print\(f'{name} \(id={lid}\): status={resp.status}, AreaMatches={len\(am\)}, TotalItems={total}, Items={len\(items\)}'\)
    
    browser.close\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python << 'PYEOF'
import requests, json

params = "culture=en-GB&timezoneOffset=-60&integration=nairabet&deviceType=1&numFormat=en-GB&countryCode=NG"

# Search for Ligue 2 - check range around French leagues
for champ_id in range\(3100, 3200\):
    url = f"https://sb2frontend-altenar2.biahosted.com/api/widget/GetEventsByChamp?{params}&champId=0&champIds={champ_id}"
    r = requests.get\(url, timeout=5\)
    text = r.text
    if text and text != "null" and r.status_code == 200:
        d = json.loads\(text\)
        champs = d.get\("availableChamps", []\)
        for c in champs:
            name = c.get\("name", ""\)
            if "ligue" in name.lower\(\) or "france" in name.lower\(\) or "french" in name.lower\(\):
                print\(f"  {c['id']}: {name}"\)

# Also try broader search
for champ_id in [2938, 2939, 2940, 2944, 2945, 2948, 2949, 2955, 2956, 2957, 2958, 2959, 2960]:
    url = f"https://sb2frontend-altenar2.biahosted.com/api/widget/GetEventsByChamp?{params}&champId=0&champIds={champ_id}"
    r = requests.get\(url, timeout=5\)
    text = r.text
    if text and text != "null" and r.status_code == 200:
        d = json.loads\(text\)
        champs = d.get\("availableChamps", []\)
        for c in champs:
            print\(f"  {c['id']}: {c['name']}"\)
PYEOF)

from NaijaBet_Api.bookmakers.nairabet_altenar import NairabetAltenar

if data:
    m = data[0]
    print\(f'Match: {m[\\"match\\"]}'\)
    for key in ['home','draw','away','home_or_draw','home_or_away','draw_or_away','over_2_5','under_2_5','btts_yes','btts_no']:
        print\(f'  {key}: {m.get\(key, \\"MISSING\\"\)}'\)

print\(\)

")
